Hi, my name is Johannes Fahrenkrug

I am a software developer from Northern Germany, currently living in New York.
I develop elegant and easy to use applications for iPhone, iPad, Mac and the web.
If you are looking for a reliable and innovative partner for your next project, we should talk.
Do you want to bring your team up to speed and need an on-site coach? I'm your guy.
